title: Goxent Intelligence Bot
description: A sophisticated full-stack automation pipeline for NEPSE market data. Features multi-source scraping, AI-powered sentiment analysis using Gemini 2.0, and automated notification workflows via Resend and Notion integration.

title: Professional Portfolio
description: A high-end, editorial-style portfolio showcasing the intersection of finance and technology. Built with a focus on performance, premium aesthetics, and interactive storytelling using Framer Motion and custom CSS.

title: Goxent Portal
description: A centralized dashboard for real-time market monitoring and institutional data analysis. Automates the tracking of broker movements and regulatory notices for retail investors.
